title: rosa × damascena var. semperflorens
intro: Rosa × damascena var. semperflorens, also known as the perpetual damask rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae and is a hybrid of Rosa damascena. This plant is valued for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The essential oil extracted from its flowers has anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in relieving digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as promoting relaxation and reducing stress. The perpetual damask rose can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and perfumes, and its oil is also used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
